mapper.sql: job_id, user_id, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, jd_text, status, progress, score, summary, strengths_json, gaps_json, recommendations_json, error_message, resume_text_hash, jd_hash, created_at, updated_at, completed_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_match_job ( user_id, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, jd_text, status, progress, jd_hash ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{objectKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{jdText}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{jdHash} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_match_job SET object_key = #{objectKey}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE resume_match_job SET status = 'UPLOADED', progress = 15, error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'UPLOAD_PENDING'
UPDATE resume_match_job SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE resume_match_job SET status = 'COMPLETED', progress = 100, score = #{score}, summary = #{summary}, strengths_json = #{strengthsJson}, gaps_json = #{gapsJson}, recommendations_json = #{recommendationsJson}, resume_text_hash = #{resumeTextHash}, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE resume_match_job SET status = 'FAILED', progress = 100, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
